name: revops
description: Revenue-operations (B2B GTM) team — 3 agents (revops-architect, pipeline-and-forecast-analyst, gtm-systems-engineer) for the lead-to-cash revenue engine above the CRM and warehouse: the funnel/bowtie definition, the RevOps data model, marketing↔sales↔CS SLAs, the GTM tech stack (revops-architect); pipeline stages & hygiene, forecast methodology (weighted vs commit/category vs AI), coverage, win-rate, velocity, deal inspection (pipeline-and-forecast-analyst); CRM hygiene & automation, lead routing & scoring, territory/quota/comp ops, attribution, data quality (gtm-systems-engineer). Decision-tree knowledge bank, 8 best-practices, 3 skills, 3 commands, 2 templates, 1 advisory hook, scenarios. Seams: CS health -> customer-success-analytics; CRM build -> salesforce; warehouse/BI -> data-platform & tableau; experiments -> experimentation-growth-engineering; significance -> applied-statistics. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
